title: Vanilla Augmented
description: A modpack that barely changes the normal game, adding Performance, QoL and Multiplayer mods
body:
# Vanilla Augmented A Vanilla+ Fabric modpack with a bunch of quality of life mods, performance improvements and some multiplayer features to provide a great SMP experience. A list of features can be seen below, for more exhaustive information browse the mod list
Voice chat can trigger sculk related stuff, make sure to tweak your volume in a way that anything below -32dB is you whispering for the best experience #### Note on Client only As of now I marked this modpack to require installation on client and server, but most of the included mods are client-side, meaning, you could join any server with these mods. That being said, I haven't tested compatibility with vanilla servers. I will consider removing the mods that prevent playing on vanilla servers or increase the risk of you getting banned if I get some feedback regarding it. ## Client Features * Improved performance and reduced memory usage * Shader & OptiFine feature support * A borderless game window! * Lan Worlds can be opened to anyone you want * More Sounds * More Particles * Download the awesome [Vanilla Tweaks Resource Packs](https://vanillatweaks.net/) right from the resource pack menu * A minimap * Other QOL tweaks * (Check out the rest of the features in the mod list below) ## Server Features * Improved Performance and reduced memory usage * Voice Chat * Chunk claiming ## Mod List **!This list of mods is only applies to the newest published version!** [//]: # (Performance Section ----------------------------------------------)
Performance - Making interactions with the game feel smoother [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Rendering Performance
[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - General-Purpose Optimization
[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Faster immediate mode rendering
[ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - Combination of multiple performance improvements, memory usage reductions and bug fixes
[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - RAM usage reduction
[Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) - Faster worldgen
[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Makes it so that entities are not rendered when you don't see them
[More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - Tries to not render stuff you don't see
[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Lowers the FPS the game is rendered at when not focused
[Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) - Makes the fullscreen game window borderless
[Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) - Removes the loading screen when changing resource packs
[Seamless Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/seamless-loading-screen) - A loading screen when joining a world
[//]: # (Rendering Section ----------------------------------------------)
Rendering - Making the game prettier or enabling you to do it [FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) - A custom skybox implementation for fabric
[Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot) - Make larger resolution screenshots
[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Shader support
[Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes the gap seen in many models
[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Replacement for the sodium options screen
[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - More toggles for Sodium
[3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Makes player skin layers 3D
[Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - Adds many particles
[Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust) - Adds Ash particles in caves
[Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain) - Weather now has particle effects
[Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop) - Fancier Bubbles
[Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) - Adds leaf particles
[Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) - Fancy clouds
[Seamless](https://modrinth.com/mod/seamless) - Connected outlines for multiblocks
OptiFine Parity [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) - A combined config for many of the options below
[Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica) - OptiFine/MCPatcher animated texture format
[Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - Use and see capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and others
[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - OptiFine/MCPatcher custom item textures
[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - OptiFine connected textures
[[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - OptiFine custom entity models
[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - More entity texture features
[FabricSkyBoxes Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes-interop) - MCPatcher/OptiFine skies with FabricSkyboxes
[OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) - Allows customization of in-game GUIs with resource packs
[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - Dynamic Lighting
[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - Adds a customizable zoom
[//]: # (Vanilla+ Section ----------------------------------------------)
Vanilla+ - Trying to improve the vanilla experience [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a Menu listing all installed mods
[Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) - Better Menu for keybinds
[Continue Button](https://modrinth.com/mod/continue) - Continue the last session with a button on the main screen
[ClickThrough](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough) - Signs and item frames no longer prevent you from opening chests
[Visual Workbench](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-workbench) - Fancy crafting tables that keep items
[Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic) - Enchanting tables keep items and allow rerolls
[Easy Anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) - Anvils keep items, renaming is free
[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - Shows what you are looking at
[Jade Addons (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade-addons-fabric) - Better mod support for Jade
[Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - Better mouse inventory management
[Sit](https://modrinth.com/mod/bl4cks-sit) - Sitting on slabs and stairs
[VTDownloader](https://modrinth.com/mod/vtdownloader) - Download Vanilla Tweaks Resource packs from within the game
[Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) - Download resource-, data- and shaderpacks within the game
[Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - Look into shulker boxes from within your inventory
[Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) - Add descriptions to enchantments
[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Add/Modify Animations
[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Shows hunger/saturation food items restore
[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - A world map
[Xaero's Minimap (Fair-Play)](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap-fair) - A minimap
[Auto Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/auto-third-person) - Automatically change to third person on certain actions
[AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) - Adds ambient sounds
[Drip Sounds (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dripsounds-fabric) - Drip particles make sounds
[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) - More footstep sounds
[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) - Physics based sound
[Snow Under Trees [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-under-trees-remastered) - Snow now generates under trees
[Armor Statues](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-statues) - Makes Armor stands more customizable in survival
[Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) - Recipe/Item Viewer
[Roughly Enough Professions (REP)](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-enough-professions-rep) - REI addon for professions
[Roughly Searchable](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-searchable) - Highlights currently searched items
[//]: # (Multiplayer Section ----------------------------------------------)
Multiplayer - Enhancing the experience when playing together [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) - Open LAN worlds to anyone
[More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Let's you look further back in chat
[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - A Voice Chat
[Voice Chat Interaction](https://modrinth.com/mod/voice-chat-interaction) - The vocie chat now interacts with sculk related stuff, the threshold for actvation is at -32dB, make sure to tweak your volume accordingly for the best experience
[Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims) - Chunk claiming
[//]: # (Libraries Section ----------------------------------------------)
Libraries - These are added because other mods depend on them [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Core Library for Fabric Mods
[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - Kotlin for mods
[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Fabric Rendering API support for Sodium
[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Config Library
[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - Config Library
[Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - Config Library
[Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - Multiplatform mod library
[Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables) - Library for searching and filtering
[CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) - Library
[M.R.U](https://modrinth.com/mod/mru) - Library
[Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib) - Library
[Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) - Library
